description_long: An adult male is depicted standing with both arms raised, holding the brim of a hat with both hands. He is dressed in a sleeveless shirt, fitted pants, and athletic shoes. Around his neck is a large, oversized bow tie, adding a playful or theatrical element to his appearance. Visible tattoos are present on his arms, and he wears a hat with a rounded crown and short brim. His posture is casual yet expressive, suggesting he may be adjusting his hat or striking a pose. The overall look is urban and contemporary, suitable for a city street or park environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male stands with arms raised, holding his hat, wearing a sleeveless shirt, fitted pants, athletic shoes, and a large bow tie.
description_view_0: Front-side view showing the man's face, hat, sleeveless shirt, bow tie, and both hands holding the hat.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the bow tie, facial features, and both arms flexed upward holding the hat.
description_view_2: Rear-side view showing the back of the hat, shirt, and the man's left arm and leg in profile.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the man's back, both arms raised, and the back of his hat and bow tie.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless shirt, fitted pants, oversized bow tie, and a rounded hat
attribute_posture: standing with both arms raised, holding the hat
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
